'''nangungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynasticity|dynasticity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynasticity|dynasticity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nangungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nængingith|nængingith]] || [[word:nængingij|nængingij]] || [[word:nængingish|nængingish]] || [[word:nængingi|nængingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangungunguth|nangungunguth]] || [[word:nangungunguj|nangungunguj]] || [[word:nangungungush|nangungungush]] || [[word:nangungungu|nangungungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nangunguth|nangunguth]] || [[word:nangunguj|nangunguj]] || [[word:nangungush|nangungush]] || [[word:nangungu|nangungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nangufngufth|nangufngufth]] || [[word:nangufngufj|nangufngufj]] || [[word:nangufngufsh|nangufngufsh]] || [[word:nangufnguf|nangufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nangunguthu|nangunguthu]] || [[word:nangunguju|nangunguju]] || [[word:nangungushu|nangungushu]] || [[word:nangunguku|nangunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nangunguth|nangunguth]] || [[word:nangunguj|nangunguj]] || [[word:nangungush|nangungush]] || [[word:nangungu|nangungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nangunguthul|nangunguthul]] || [[word:nangungujul|nangungujul]] || [[word:nangungushul|nangungushul]] || [[word:nangungukul|nangungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nangunguuthuthu|nangunguuthuthu]] || [[word:nangunguujuju|nangunguujuju]] || [[word:nangunguushushu|nangunguushushu]] || [[word:nangunguuku|nangunguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nangunguthun|nangunguthun]] || [[word:nangungujun|nangungujun]] || [[word:nangungushun|nangungushun]] || [[word:nangungukun|nangungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nangunguthuoro|nangunguthuoro]] || [[word:nangungujuoro|nangungujuoro]] || [[word:nangungushuoro|nangungushuoro]] || [[word:nangungukuoro|nangungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
